function.name: tool

calls.description: Ordered JSON tool calls. Each item must be an object with a tool field and optional tool-specific fields.

items.description: One JSON tool call. Use tool plus canonical fields such as query, path, prompt, url, content, old, new, lines, edit, action, or image.

query.description: Generic primary value for grep text, find patterns, bash commands, web queries, or ask queries.

path.description: Workspace path or paths. For read, use file targets like 'src/app.ts:L10-40' or arrays for multi-read. For list, use '.' for the current working directory. For bash, this acts as cwd.

old.description: Used by edit. Copy exact existing file text.

lines.description: Optional edit hint in start-end format.

edit.description: Structured edit payload for edit. Prefer an array of { old, new, lines? } objects for multiple replacements.

lines.description: Optional edit range hint. Prefer including it when available.
